a.title: Информация об использовании элемента

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Минимальное и максимальное кол-во раз, которое может отображаться элемент в экземпляре

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px; width: 100px

a.title: Ссылка на тип элемента

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Дополнительная информация о элементе
Legend for this format

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1.png)

a.title: Source reference for Health Interventions - exactly one of the following must be provided: - url (url data type): URL to retrieve HealthInterventions definition from input/ or external source - canonical (canonical data type): Canonical URI pointing to the HealthInterventions definition - instance: Inline HealthInterventions instance data

table.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top;

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: The logical name of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Legend for this format

description.value: Source reference for Health Interventions - exactly one of the following must be provided: - url (url data type): URL to retrieve HealthInterventions definition from input/ or external source - canonical (canonical data type): Canonical URI pointing to the HealthInterventions definition - instance: Inline HealthInterventions instance data

definition.value: Source reference for Health Interventions - exactly one of the following must be provided: - url (url data type): URL to retrieve HealthInterventions definition from input/ or external source - canonical (canonical data type): Canonical URI pointing to the HealthInterventions definition - instance: Inline HealthInterventions instance data
URL to retrieve HealthInterventions definition from input/ or external source
Canonical URI pointing to the HealthInterventions definition
